title: Autoimmune Hepatitis
subtitle: Understanding and managing autoimmune hepatitis
description: Clear, evidence-based information about autoimmune hepatitis (AIH) — what it is, how it is diagnosed, treatment options, and living well with the condition. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.

British Society of Gastroenterology — Guidelines for the Management of Autoimmune Hepatitis
